programs.title: Elinor Wonders Why
programs.sub_title: Melting Point; Mr. Raccoon's Bad Day
programs.desc: While delivering chocolates, the kids learn that warmer temperatures can melt treats; the kids help Mr. Raccoon calm down when he is having a bad day.

programs.title: Alma's Way
programs.sub_title: Alma Goes to Puerto Rico: Bisabuela's Birthday
programs.desc: On Alma's great-grandmother's 100th birthday, Alma wants to find Bisabuela the perfect gift; even though she can think of all kinds of things that Bisabuela likes, none of them are quite right.

programs.title: Molly of Denali
programs.sub_title: Lynx to the Past; Molly of the Yukon
programs.desc: Trini is discouraged because she can't add her own moves to the Lynx Dance; Molly hopes to catch a Yukon River king salmon.

programs.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum
programs.sub_title: I Am Bessie Coleman; I Am King Sejong the Great
programs.desc: Yadina learns that if she wants to reach the top of the hill, she must keep going; everyone has ideas that are worth sharing.

programs.title: Finding Your Roots With Henry Louis Gates, Jr.
programs.desc: Actor Michael Douglas and writer/director Lena Dunham explore their family roots.

programs.title: American Muslims: A History Revealed
programs.desc: Even before the United States is founded, tens of thousands of Muslims are already here, captured in West Africa and brought to colonial America in chains; Asma Khalid tells the story of one of these people.
